name: Rice Stuffed Tomatoes
recipeInstructions:
1. Scoop out the tomatoes.
2. Cook the rice according to package directions.
3. Sauté the onion and green bell pepper in unsalted butter until softened.
4. Add the cooked rice, salt, pepper, and Accent seasoning mix to the sautéed vegetables.
5. Stuff each tomato with the rice mixture.
6. Sprinkle Parmesan cheese on top of each stuffed tomato.
7. Bake at 350°F for 30 minutes.
Serves 8
